message:
fix(self_stabilize): allow tombstones in ReconcileMessage::Patch

Changes Patch variant from Vec<(Vec<u8>, Vec<u8>)> to
Vec<(Vec<u8>, Option<Vec<u8>>)> so that reconciliation can represent
key deletions (tombstones) as None values, not just upserts. Without
this, the self-stabilization protocol could not converge when one
replica had deleted an entry that another still held.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
